_comment: GitHub Orchestration Plugin - GitHub integration and CLI setup
_notes: Installs GitHub CLI on remote, warns on local
Branch context and issue sync at session start
Creates GitHub issue on first user prompt
Tracks issues created during sessions for cross-session discovery
Surfaces related issues from previous sessions based on branch family
Plan-to-issue synchronization with versioned update comments
Explore agent findings posted as issue comments
Detects PR creation and suggests checking CI
Validates git state on session end
description: GitHub integration with branch context, commit review, and issue orchestration

hooks.description: Installs GitHub CLI on remote, warns if missing on local
Displays branch issue context, sync status, and outstanding issues
Creates GitHub issue on first prompt, renames branch to {issueNum}-{type}/{name}
Automatically creates/updates GitHub issues from plan files
Tracks issues created via gh issue create for cross-session discovery
Enhances commits with task and issue context (both main and subagent)
Detects PR creation and suggests checking CI
Syncs gh issue edit body changes back to local plan file
Posts Explore agent findings as comments on linked GitHub issue
Validates git state and reports PR status on session stop
Closes linked GitHub issue if session ends without PR
